name: Mîr-Zaldrion
personality: Radiant scales that catch the light like a freshly merged conflict-free PR, with × cancel-eyes that signal hard stops on anything too structured. The tiny duck hat was earned from a bet about whether you could rewrite an auth service in a weekend — it won, obviously.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
